name: Tax-Free Complete Liquidation of a Subsidiary

eligibility.description: The parent corporation must own at least 80% of the voting power and value of the subsidiary and complete the distribution within the taxable year or within 3 years under a plan.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Eliminates gain or loss recognition when a parent corporation liquidates an 80%-owned subsidiary.
